result.status_detail: 차단 warning rendered as Korean banner; no RRN decode; logged-in

evidence.warning_text_quote: 민감정보가 포함된 요청은 보안 정책에 의해 차단되었습니다.

recommendation: v2.2.3 baseline confirmed OK for claude — S2 warning intact, text rendered, RRN never decoded. No regression detected. Proceed with remaining mass-rotation services.
notes: v2.2.3 baseline mass rotation #814 — claude. Warning banner with ⚠ icon + Korean text 'sensitive info blocked by security policy' rendered immediately after submit. Plantynet auth confirmed (logged-in user, prompt accepted, response area received block message instead of model answer). 'This conversation could not be found' toast is a post-block UI artifact (chat record not persisted), unrelated to S2 warning. v2.2.3 engine behaving as expected for claude service.
